name: Don Kirkpatrick
abstract: Don Kirkpatrick (June 17, 1905 – May 13, 1956) was an American jazz pianist and arranger. He was born in Charlotte, North Carolina, United States.

about_quotes.speaker: Monk Montgomery
about_quotes.evidence: I played this concert with him... He used all New York musicians -- Don Kirkpatrick on piano was a New Yorker... But it was an all New York band.

about_quotes.speaker: Charlie Holmes
about_quotes.evidence: Johnny and his brother-in-law, Kirkpatrick. The three of us were walking down Lenox Avenue... Kirk and Johnny were talking

about_quotes.speaker: Cootie Williams
about_quotes.evidence: We looked up the personnel when you were with Chick. And you remembered, it was Don Kirkpatrick on piano. Yeah.

about_quotes.speaker: Danny Barker
about_quotes.evidence: Simeon, myself, Don Kirkpatrick, Freddie Moore, we all sit there and listened.

about_quotes.speaker: Freddie Moore
about_quotes.evidence: The (?) had a good piano player, Don Kirkpatrick... We all linked up together.
